---
# This file demonstrates how a vignette author wires up the
# warrant-vignette Quarto extension. Render with:
#
#   quarto render example.qmd
#
# Note: the .qmd has no body content. Every field that varies by
# vignette lives in YAML metadata; the typst-template.typ extracts the
# fields and dispatches to warrant-packet().

format: warrant-vignette-typst

# Which document(s) to include in this packet, in order.
document-types:
  - affidavit
  - attachment
  - exhibit
  - warrant
  - return

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Jurisdiction (fixed across study — could be sourced from a shared YAML
# file via Quarto includes if you prefer to DRY this).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
state: Westbridge
county: Hartwell County
city: Northfield
court-name: Hartwell County Court
judicial-district: 4th Judicial District

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Personnel (fixed across study).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
clerk-name: M. Donovan
judge-name: Hon. R. Patterson
judge-title-full: County Judge — 4th Judicial District
detective-name: Detective J. Hayes
detective-badge: "#142"
detective-unit: Northfield Police Investigations Unit
detective-division: Northfield Police Division
detective-years: 22
notary-name: M. Reilly
notary-commission-exp: March 4, 2027

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Per-case identifiers (variable per condition).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
case-number: CR24-087
case-id-barcode: 000087412D03
filed-date: AUG 12 2024
filed-time: "10:42"
warrant-time: "9:05"
warrant-period: DAYTIME

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Substantive content (variable per condition). Replace the placeholder
# bracketed text with the actual content for each condition.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
search-address: 419 W. Maple Avenue, Northfield, Hartwell County, Westbridge
property-description: |
  This is a two story house on the northeast corner of the intersection
  of W. Maple Ave. and 4th St. The porch and front door are on the
  south side of the residence.

suspect-names:
  - "[Suspect A]"
  - "[Suspect B]"

items-to-seize:
  - Electronic information devices such as computers, phones, electronic tablets.
  - External storage devices such as flash drives, used for the purpose of saving electronic information on.
  - Medications which could be used for the purpose of [redacted].
  - Evidence of internet searches and/or purchase of medications which could be used for the purpose of [redacted].
  - Messages regarding the use of medications which could be used for the purpose of [redacted].

narrative-paragraphs:
  - "On 04-26-24 I began an investigation into the concerns that [Suspect B], age 17, had given birth prematurely to a stillborn child. [Suspect B] enacted the help of [Suspect A] and the two of them buried the child together. Both individuals were telling others they needed to dig the child's body up and then burn it."
  - "Over the next days I conducted interviews and obtained medical records. The medical records I obtained on 04-29-24 showed [Suspect B] had been pregnant on 03-08-24. The pregnancy was estimated to be 23 weeks and 2 days along with a due date of 07-03-24."
  - "On 04-29-24 I interviewed both [Suspect A] and [Suspect B] separately. The investigation continued through medical records, social-media records, and witness interviews."
  - "On 06-07-24 I obtained and served a search warrant to a social-media platform for information on the suspects' accounts. On 06-09-24 I received the results of that search warrant, which included messages between the suspects discussing the purchase and use of medications."

inventory-items:
  - "Samsung Galaxy A10e Smart phone Model #SM-A102U1, Serial #RF8N41QDFOE"
  - "LG Smartphone Model G7 ThinQ, Serial #902KPNY0198743"
  - "Samsung Galaxy S7 Model #SM-G930F, Serial #R58H64LQJAP"
  - "Toshiba laptop computer, Model PSSD2N-01900K, Serial #X9059212H"
  - "Dell Latitude 5580 laptop computer, Serial #JF7KPH2"
  - "Lenovo Thinkpad laptop computer, Serial #L3-N3323 08/03"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Exhibit content (variable per condition). Choose an `exhibit-type` and
# supply matching `exhibit-records`.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
exhibit-description: |
  Attached are printouts (2 pages) of the conversation between
  [Suspect A] and [Suspect B] dated 04-20-24 over a social-media
  platform concerning the purchase and use of the medication.

exhibit-type: meta-records
exhibit-starting-page: 1403

exhibit-records:
  - {author: "[Suspect A]", account: "100009604664543", sent: "2024-04-20 16:47:34 UTC", body: "Hey we can get the show on the road the stuff came in"}
  - {author: "[Suspect B]", account: "592346902",        sent: "2024-04-20 16:47:37 UTC", body: "Bet"}
  - {author: "[Suspect A]", account: "100009604664543", sent: "2024-04-20 16:48:02 UTC", body: "It came 2day"}
  - {author: "[Suspect B]", account: "592346902",        sent: "2024-04-20 16:48:36 UTC", body: "Just the one or both"}
  - {author: "[Suspect A]", account: "100009604664543", sent: "2024-04-20 16:49:14 UTC", body: "Both"}
  - {author: "[Suspect A]", account: "100009604664543", sent: "2024-04-20 16:49:27 UTC", body: "What I ordered last month"}
  - {author: "[Suspect B]", account: "592346902",        sent: "2024-04-20 16:50:06 UTC", body: "Are we starting it today"}
  - {author: "[Suspect A]", account: "100009604664543", sent: "2024-04-20 16:50:30 UTC", body: "We can if u want the one will stop the hormones"}
---
